reason: All acceptance criteria verified. EscalationRequest frozen dataclass. EscalationReason 3 values (out_of_scope, low_confidence, emotion_trigger). SLA_BY_PRIORITY {0:30, 1:15, 2:5} configurable. create() computes sla_deadline=NOW+SLA_BY_PRIORITY[priority], returns id. assign() sets assigned_agent+picked_at. resolve() sets resolved_at. get_sla_breaches() queries resolved_at IS NULL AND sla_deadline < NOW(), order by priority DESC. Invalid priority raises ValueError. All 16/16 tests pass. Coverage 79% (escalation v1 lowers avg, v2 at 100%).
